title: galium obliquum var. luteolum
intro: Galium obliquum var. luteolum, also known as yellow-fruited bedstraw, is a perennial plant species within the Rubiaceae family, characterized by its yellow fruits and oblique stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galium obliquum var. luteolum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Galium obliquum var. luteolum can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which is often used to promote digestive health and relieve respiratory issues.
